examples.title: Pseudocode: Target Language Example
examples.description: This pseudocode demonstrates a simple translation from source code to target language.
examples.code:
ALGORITHM TranslateToTargetLanguage
INPUT: sourceCode
OUTPUT: targetCode

BEGIN
 FOR EACH instruction IN sourceCode DO
 IF instruction IS assignment THEN
 targetCode += TranslateAssignment(instruction)
 ELSE IF instruction IS conditional THEN
 targetCode += TranslateConditional(instruction)
 END IF
 END FOR
 RETURN targetCode
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode takes source code as input and translates it into target code. It uses a simple if-else statement to determine the type of instruction and calls the corresponding translation function.
